calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Sauceda.
Petitioner: Xiao Chen, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Ziying Wang, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Jennifer Chen.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Reset To Jan-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Petitioner: Xiao Chen, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Ziying Wang, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Jan. 10, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Order granting continuance without rebulishing of the OSC. signed by Comm. Kaplan.
